title: Configuration Wizard State
description: Schema for the wizard state file (.artifacts/state/configure-wizard.json) used by the configuration wizard prompt chain to persist state across steps.

completed.description: Whether the current step has been completed.

languages.description: Detected or user-specified languages from Step 1.

framework.description: Detected or user-specified framework from Step 1.

has_iac.description: Whether infrastructure-as-code was detected in Step 1.

has_tests.description: Whether tests were detected in Step 1.

policy_profile.description: Policy profile mapped from governance level in Step 2.

use_custom_models.description: Whether per-panel model assignment was configured in Step 3.

parallel_coders.description: Number of parallel Coder agents from Step 4.

use_project_manager.description: Whether PM mode is enabled from Step 4.

parallel_tech_leads.description: Number of parallel Tech Leads from Step 4 (when PM mode is enabled).

generated_config.description: The complete generated project.yaml dict from Step 5.
